subcodes.first_line: O fruits of the Divine Lote-Tree! Hearken from this wilderness unto the call of the Lord of all creation. This indeed is that wilderness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اثمار سدره ندای مالک بریه را از این بریه اصغا نمائید این همان صحرائیست
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @role and station of women, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Moses
